generated_diagrams.title: Student Event Registration Journey
generated_diagrams.mermaid:
graph TD
    Start(Start: Student Accesses Site) --> UC1[UC1: View Events]
    UC1 --> Decision1{Requires Login/Signup?}

    Decision1 -- Yes, New User --> UC3[UC3: Sign Up (FR-4)]
    UC3 --> UC4[UC4: Log In (FR-5)]
    Decision1 -- Existing User --> UC4

    UC4 --> UC2[UC2: Register for Event (FR-2, FR-12)]
    UC2 --> Decision2{Paid Event?}

    Decision2 -- Yes --> UC8[UC8: Process Payment (FR-13)]
    UC8 --> ConfirmTicket[Generate PDF Ticket (FR-14)]
    ConfirmTicket --> SendEmail[Send Confirmation & Reminder (FR-3, FR-16)]

    Decision2 -- No --> SendEmail
    SendEmail --> UC5[UC5: View Registrations (FR-6)]
    UC5 --> End(End: Event Managed)

generated_diagrams.title: Organizer Event Management Workflow
generated_diagrams.mermaid:
graph TD
    Start(Start: Organizer Accesses Admin Dashboard) --> UC4[UC4: Log In (FR-5)]
    UC4 --> Dashboard[FR-7: Admin Dashboard]

    Dashboard -- "Manage Events" --> UC6_Menu{UC6: Manage Events}
    UC6_Menu -- "Create" --> FR8[FR-8: Create Event]
    UC6_Menu -- "Edit" --> FR9[FR-9: Edit Event]
    UC6_Menu -- "Delete" --> FR10[FR-10: Delete Event]

    Dashboard -- "View Statistics" --> UC7[UC7: View Registration Statistics (FR-11)]
    Dashboard -- "Export Data" --> UC9[UC9: Export Participant Data (FR-15)]

    FR8 --> End(End: Organizer Operations Complete)
    FR9 --> End
    FR10 --> End
    UC7 --> End
    UC9 --> End

generated_diagrams.title: Payment Processing & Ticket Generation Flow
generated_diagrams.mermaid:
graph TD
    A[Student Initiates Payment for Event] --> B{UC8: Process Payment}
    B --> C[FR-13: Integrate with Payment Gateway]
    C --> D(External System: Payment Gateway)
    D -- "Payment Successful" --> E[System: Receive Payment Confirmation]
    E --> F[FR-14: Generate PDF Ticket with QR Code]
    F --> G[System: Send Ticket to Student]
    G --> H[Student Receives Ticket]
    D -- "Payment Failed" --> I[System: Notify Student of Failure]
    I --> J[Student Retries/Cancels]

generated_diagrams.title: Student Event Registration State Machine
generated_diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
    direction LR
    [*] --> NotRegistered

    NotRegistered --> RegistrationInitiated : Student clicks 'Register'
    RegistrationInitiated --> NotRegistered : Abandons registration
    RegistrationInitiated --> PendingPayment : Submits form (paid event)
    RegistrationInitiated --> Registered : Submits form (free event)

    PendingPayment --> Registered : UC8: Payment successful
    PendingPayment --> NotRegistered : Payment fails/times out

    Registered --> TicketIssued : FR-14: Ticket generated (for paid event)
    Registered --> Cancelled : Student cancels (free/paid before ticket)
    Registered --> Expired : Event date passed

    TicketIssued --> Cancelled : Student cancels (after ticket)
    TicketIssued --> Expired : Event date passed

actors.name: Student
actors.description: A college student who wants to view, register for, and manage their event registrations.

actors.name: Organizer
actors.description: A college staff member or event coordinator responsible for creating, managing, and monitoring events.

use_cases.name: View Events
use_cases.outcome: Student views a list of upcoming events.

use_cases.name: Register for Event
use_cases.trigger: Student selects an event to register.
use_cases.outcome: Student successfully registers for the event and receives a confirmation email.

use_cases.name: Sign Up
use_cases.trigger: Student chooses to create a new account.
use_cases.outcome: Student account is created using their college email address.

use_cases.name: Log In
use_cases.trigger: User attempts to access personalized or admin features.
use_cases.outcome: User is authenticated and gains access to their respective dashboard/features.

use_cases.name: View Registrations
use_cases.trigger: Logged-in student navigates to their registrations section.
use_cases.outcome: Student views a list of events they have registered for.

use_cases.name: Manage Events
use_cases.trigger: Organizer accesses the admin dashboard's event management section.
use_cases.outcome: Organizer successfully creates, edits, or deletes an event.

use_cases.name: View Registration Statistics
use_cases.trigger: Organizer accesses the admin dashboard's statistics section.
use_cases.outcome: Organizer views registration analytics and statistics for events.

use_cases.name: Process Payment
use_cases.trigger: Student proceeds to pay for a paid event during registration.
use_cases.outcome: Payment is successfully processed, and a downloadable PDF ticket with a QR code is generated.

use_cases.name: Export Participant Data
use_cases.trigger: Organizer selects an event and chooses to export participant data.
use_cases.outcome: Organizer downloads participant data in CSV format.

functional_requirements.text: The system shall allow students to view upcoming events.
The system shall allow students to register for events.
The system shall send an email confirmation to students after successful registration.
The system shall allow students to sign up using their college email address.
The system shall allow students and organizers to log in using their credentials.
The system shall allow students to view their past and upcoming event registrations.
The system shall provide an admin dashboard for organizers.
The system shall allow organizers to create events.
The system shall allow organizers to edit existing events.
The system shall allow organizers to delete events.
The system shall display registration statistics to organizers.
The system shall collect Name, Email, Department, Year of Study, and Phone Number during student registration.
The system shall integrate with a payment gateway (e.g., Razorpay) for paid events.
The system shall generate a downloadable PDF ticket with a QR code for students after payment.
The system shall allow organizers to export participant data in CSV format.
The system shall send reminder emails to students 24 hours before an event.
